content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.channels.signal_channel
FILE: cosmos/integration/channels/signal_channel.py (459 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Signal Channel Adapter
==================================

Signal Messenger integration for the Cosmos swarm.

Features:
- End-to-end encrypted messaging
- Groups and group v2
- Attachments
- Reactions
- Typing indicators
- Read receipts
- Disappearing messages
- Stickers

Based on signal-cli

CLASSES:
- SignalChannel(BaseChannel): Signal Messenger channel adapter via signal-cli daemon.

Supports:
- Direct mess
  Methods: async def connect(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def disconnect(self)
  Methods: async def send_message(self, recipient: str, text: str, media_path: Optional[str]=None, reply_to: Op
  Methods: async def send_reaction(self, recipient: str, target_timestamp: str, target_author: str, emoji: str)
  Methods: async def send_read_receipt(self, sender: str, timestamps: List[str]) -> bool
  Methods: async def get_contacts(self) -> List[Dict]
  Methods: async def get_groups(self) -> List[Dict]
  Methods: async def create_group(self, name: str, members: List[str]) -> Optional[str]
